summary: Konekt B2B Platform Iteration 344 - Multi-Country Data Isolation. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. All country filtering features verified: Dashboard KPIs accept ?country= query param (TZ/KE), user registration derives country_code from phone prefix (+255=TZ, +254=KE, +256=UG), active country config endpoint works. Frontend: Public expansion pages /expand/ke and /expand/ug accessible without login, Settings Hub country selector shows TZ/KE/UG buttons, admin login with anti-bot protection works.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard KPIs correctly filter by country_code when ?country= param provided
User registration stores country_code derived from phone prefix in user_doc
Public expansion routes /expand/ke and /expand/ug correctly render without authentication
Settings Hub country selector bar shows TZ/KE/UG buttons with active state indicator
Quote and invoice documents include country_code field for data isolation
seed_data_creation: Test users created with timestamp suffix for uniqueness during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-country data isolation fully implemented and verified: 1) Dashboard KPIs at /api/admin/dashboard/kpis accept ?country= query param (TZ, KE, UG) to filter all metrics by country_code. 2) User registration derives country_code from phone prefix using _resolve_country_from_phone helper (+255=TZ, +254=KE, +256=UG, +250=RW). 3) Public expansion pages /expand/ke and /expand/ug accessible without login - show country-specific landing pages with interest registration forms. 4) Settings Hub has country selector bar at top showing Tanzania (active), Kenya, Uganda buttons. 5) Quote and invoice documents include country_code field for data isolation.

dashboard_kpis_no_filter.details: GET /api/admin/dashboard/kpis returns all data with kpis, operations, finance, charts keys

dashboard_kpis_ke_filter.details: GET /api/admin/dashboard/kpis?country=KE returns Kenya-filtered data (0 since no KE orders)

register_tz_phone_prefix.details: POST /api/auth/register with +255 phone prefix creates user with country_code=TZ

register_ke_phone_prefix.details: POST /api/auth/register with +254 phone prefix creates user with country_code=KE

register_ug_phone_prefix.details: POST /api/auth/register with +256 phone prefix creates user with country_code=UG

admin_login_with_timing.details: Admin login with form_loaded_at timing field works correctly

admin_login_backwards_compat.details: Admin login without form_loaded_at still works for backwards compatibility

active_country_config.details: GET /api/admin/active-country-config returns country configuration with code, name, currency, phone_prefix

expand_ke_public_page.details: Public route /expand/ke loads Kenya expansion page with 'Konekt is coming to Kenya' heading

expand_ug_public_page.details: Public route /expand/ug loads Uganda expansion page with 'Konekt is coming to Uganda' heading

settings_hub_country_selector.details: Settings Hub shows country selector bar with TZ/KE/UG buttons, Tanzania active by default
